mentions.note: Electrical distribution equipment for data centers, power grid, energy-intensive industrial; covered March (month after IPO), up 75% from $34 to $59 on two strong quarters; did secondary in May but kept rallying; at these levels ring the register—lockup on insider selling ends early August.
Electrical distribution, components, and data center play; incredible stock up since Feb 5; Cramer plans separate deep-dive coverage.
